testedAssertions.assertionName: Feature listing stays mission-scoped and filterable
testedAssertions.criteria: maestro feature list --mission <id> requires mission scoping and can filter by --milestone and --status

tests.name: List all features for mission
tests.actualResult: Success - returns all 5 features with correct total/filtered counts

tests.name: Filter by milestone m1
tests.expectedResult: Returns 3 features (f1-m1, f2-m1, f3-m1) with filtered: 3
tests.actualResult: Success - returns 3 features from milestone m1, total still 5, filtered: 3

tests.name: Filter by milestone m2
tests.actualResult: Success - returns 2 features from milestone m2, total still 5, filtered: 2

tests.name: Filter by status pending
tests.actualResult: Success - returns 5 features initially, then 4 after one was moved to in_progress

tests.name: Filter by status in_progress
tests.expectedResult: Returns 1 feature (f1-m1) after it was moved to in_progress
tests.actualResult: Success - returns 0 when no in_progress features, 1 when f1-m1 was in_progress

tests.name: Combined milestone + status filter
tests.expectedResult: Returns features in m1 with pending status
tests.actualResult: Success - correctly filters by both milestone and status

testedAssertions.assertionName: Feature updates persist status and worker reports safely
testedAssertions.criteria: maestro feature update enforces legal transitions, stores worker reports, preserves reports on retry

tests.name: Legal transition: pending -> in_progress
tests.actualResult: Success - feature status updated to in_progress, updatedAt timestamp refreshed

tests.name: Legal transition: in_progress -> in_review
tests.actualResult: Success - feature status updated to in_review

tests.name: Retry transition: in_review -> pending
tests.expectedResult: Status reset to pending for retry
tests.actualResult: Success - status reset to pending, report preserved

tests.name: Invalid transition rejected
tests.expectedResult: Error: pending cannot transition directly to in_review
tests.actualResult: Error correctly raised: 'Invalid feature transition: pending -> in_review' with hint showing valid transitions

tests.name: Attach worker report via @file
tests.expectedResult: Report attached and persisted to workers/f1-m1/report.json
tests.actualResult: Success - report persisted, reportPersisted path returned, report embedded in feature

tests.name: Report persists after retry to pending
tests.expectedResult: Feature f1-m1 still has report after status reset to pending
tests.actualResult: Success - report with content, timestamp, and agent fields preserved after retry

reportContent.content: Implemented the feature with unit tests and documentation

summary: All assertions passed. Feature listing commands correctly filter by mission, milestone, and status. Feature updates enforce the state machine (no invalid transitions allowed), worker reports are persisted to disk and embedded in feature state, and reports are preserved when retrying to pending status.
